title: 竞媒小动态
scope: 过去 12 个月｜TikTok、Meta｜CPG：美妆、零售、食品

items.title: Meta Launches New Era Of Shopping Experiences Powered By AI , Reels & Creators
items.titleEn: Meta Launches New Era Of Shopping Experiences Powered By AI , Reels & Creators
items.titleZh: Meta 推出由 AI、Reels 和创作者驱动的购物体验
items.summaryEn: Meta introduced shopping experiences that combine AI, Reels, and creators to support product discovery and social commerce conversion.
items.summaryZh: Meta 推出结合 AI、Reels 和创作者的购物体验，聚焦商品发现和社交电商转化。

items.title: Thai beauty platform Konvy secures US$15 million from Cool Japan Fund
items.titleEn: Thai beauty platform Konvy secures US$15 million from Cool Japan Fund
items.titleZh: 泰国美妆平台 Konvy 获 Cool Japan Fund 1500 万美元投资
items.summaryEn: Thai beauty platform Konvy secured US$15 million from Cool Japan Fund to expand its beauty retail business.
items.summaryZh: 泰国美妆平台 Konvy 获得 Cool Japan Fund 1500 万美元投资，用于扩展美妆零售业务。

items.title: TikTok Shop honors standout creators at 2026 Creator Awards
items.titleEn: TikTok Shop honors standout creators at 2026 Creator Awards
items.titleZh: TikTok Shop 在 2026 创作者奖中表彰头部创作者
items.summaryEn: TikTok Shop recognized standout creators at its 2026 Creator Awards, continuing to promote its creator commerce ecosystem.
items.summaryZh: TikTok Shop 在 2026 Creator Awards 中表彰表现突出的创作者，继续强化创作者电商生态。

items.title: Zalando hires TikTok veteran to get brands to pay for marketing
items.titleEn: Zalando hires TikTok veteran to get brands to pay for marketing
items.titleZh: Zalando 引入 TikTok 老将推动品牌付费营销
items.summaryEn: Zalando hired a TikTok veteran to encourage brands to buy marketing services on its platform.
items.summaryZh: Zalando 聘请 TikTok 背景的高管，推动品牌在其平台上购买营销服务。

items.title: Branded Buzz + Search Hubs
items.titleZh: 品牌种草声量 + 搜索中心
items.summaryEn: TikTok connects scaled creator buzz with branded search hubs, turning content interest into search demand and conversion paths.
items.summaryZh: TikTok 把达人批量种草和搜索顶部品牌阵地打通，将内容兴趣承接到主动搜索和转化路径。

items.title: Symphony + Reference to Video
items.summaryEn: TikTok is making Symphony AI video generation more controllable, including ways to specify how products or reference images appear in a video.
items.summaryZh: TikTok 提升 Symphony AI 视频生成的可控性，允许广告主指定产品或图像在视频中的出现方式。

items.title: Tag , Youre Liable : What Instagram New Affiliate Reels Mean for Retailers | Ballard Spahr LLP
items.titleEn: Tag , Youre Liable : What Instagram New Affiliate Reels Mean for Retailers | Ballard Spahr LLP
items.titleZh: Instagram 新联盟 Reels 对零售商的风险和机会
items.summaryEn: The article explains Instagram's new affiliate Reels format and the potential compliance and liability issues for retailers.
items.summaryZh: 文章解读 Instagram 新的联盟 Reels 形态，并讨论零售商可能面临的合规和责任问题。

items.title: Meta trial raises stakes as possible exit from New Mexico sparks concerns for local businesses
items.titleEn: Meta trial raises stakes as possible exit from New Mexico sparks concerns for local businesses
items.titleZh: Meta 诉讼风险引发本地商家对平台退出的担忧
items.summaryEn: A Meta-related legal case could affect service availability in New Mexico, raising concerns among local businesses.
items.summaryZh: Meta 相关诉讼可能影响其在新墨西哥州的服务，引发当地商家对平台可用性的担忧。

items.title: Walmart Has 23 . 6 % of U . S . Grocery Sales - But Costco Owns the AI Answer - 5W Grocery Retail AI Visibility Index 20
items.titleEn: Walmart Has 23 . 6 % of U . S . Grocery Sales - But Costco Owns the AI Answer - 5W Grocery Retail AI Visibility Index 20
items.titleZh: 5W 零售 AI 可见度指数：Walmart 占美国食品零售 23.6%，Costco 在 AI 答案中更强
items.summaryEn: 5W's retail AI visibility index says Walmart holds 23.6% of U.S. grocery sales, while Costco has stronger visibility in AI-generated answers.
items.summaryZh: 5W 的零售 AI 可见度指数显示，Walmart 占美国食品零售份额 23.6%，而 Costco 在 AI 搜索答案中更具可见度。

items.title: Nykaa sued over alleged copyright misuse of songs on Instagram reels
items.titleEn: Nykaa sued over alleged copyright misuse of songs on Instagram reels
items.titleZh: Nykaa 因 Instagram Reels 音乐版权使用问题被起诉
items.summaryEn: Beauty retailer Nykaa was sued over alleged copyright misuse of songs in Instagram Reels.
items.summaryZh: 美妆零售商 Nykaa 因 Instagram Reels 中的歌曲版权使用问题被起诉。

items.title: TikTok launches international ad platform campaign
items.titleEn: TikTok launches international ad platform campaign
items.titleZh: TikTok 发起国际广告平台营销战役
items.summaryEn: TikTok launched an international campaign to promote its advertising platform and marketing capabilities.
items.summaryZh: TikTok 发起国际广告平台营销战役，对外宣传其广告产品和营销能力。

items.title: TikTok Shop on Track to Seize 10 % of Retail Sales
items.titleEn: TikTok Shop on Track to Seize 10 % of Retail Sales
items.titleZh: TikTok Shop 有望占据零售销售 10% 份额
items.summaryEn: The report says TikTok Shop's growth could put it on track to capture 10% of retail sales.
items.summaryZh: 报道称 TikTok Shop 的增长势头可能使其占据零售销售的 10% 份额。

items.title: FAQ on brand safety : How AI content and creator marketing are reshaping risk in 2026
items.titleEn: FAQ on brand safety : How AI content and creator marketing are reshaping risk in 2026
items.titleZh: 品牌安全 FAQ：AI 内容和创作者营销如何改写 2026 年风险
items.summaryEn: The article discusses how AI content and creator marketing may reshape brand safety risks in 2026.
items.summaryZh: 文章讨论 AI 内容和创作者营销在 2026 年对品牌安全风险的影响。

items.title: Beauty Giants Race to Own the AI Shopping Moment
items.titleEn: Beauty Giants Race to Own the AI Shopping Moment
items.titleZh: 美妆巨头争夺 AI 购物场景
items.summaryEn: Beauty companies are accelerating AI shopping experiences to influence how consumers discover and choose products.
items.summaryZh: 美妆企业正在加快布局 AI 购物体验，以占据消费者发现和选购场景。

items.title: How to use social media for retail brands : 5 key strategies
items.titleEn: How to use social media for retail brands : 5 key strategies
items.titleZh: 零售品牌如何使用社交媒体：5 个关键策略
items.summaryEn: The article summarizes five key strategies for retail brands using social media.
items.summaryZh: 文章总结零售品牌使用社交媒体的 5 个关键策略。

items.title: Kewei Zhu : The creative systems architect behind TikTok Shop biggest U . S . selling moments
items.titleEn: Kewei Zhu : The creative systems architect behind TikTok Shop biggest U . S . selling moments
items.titleZh: TikTok Shop 美国大促背后的创意系统设计者 Kewei Zhu
items.summaryEn: The article profiles Kewei Zhu's creative systems work behind major U.S. selling moments on TikTok Shop.
items.summaryZh: 文章介绍 Kewei Zhu 在 TikTok Shop 美国大型销售节点中的创意系统设计工作。

items.title: Smart+ / Pulse View+ / Collage Carousel
items.summaryEn: TikTok is expanding Smart+, Pulse View+, and commerce-forward formats, showing continued investment in automation and shoppable content.
items.summaryZh: TikTok 强化 Smart+、Pulse View+ 和商品展示形态，显示其在自动化投放与内容电商承接上持续加码。

items.title: Best strategies for FMCG to sell on TikTok Shop
items.titleEn: Best strategies for FMCG to sell on TikTok Shop
items.titleZh: FMCG 品牌在 TikTok Shop 销售的关键策略
items.summaryEn: The article outlines ways for FMCG brands to sell on TikTok Shop, including store operations, content, and creator collaboration.
items.summaryZh: 文章梳理 FMCG 品牌在 TikTok Shop 上销售的方法，包括店铺运营、内容和创作者合作。
